level1.name: homo.n.02
level1.definition: any living or extinct member of the family Hominidae characterized by superior intelligence, articulate speech, and erect carriage

level1.name: function.n.03
level1.definition: the actions and activities assigned to or required or expected of a person or group

level1.name: critical.s.04
level1.definition: urgently needed; absolutely necessary

level1.name: reader.n.01
level1.definition: a person who enjoys reading

level1.name: connection.n.01
level1.definition: a relation between things or events (as in the case of one causing the other or sharing features with it)

level1.name: holocene.n.01
level1.definition: approximately the last 10,000 years

level1.name: field_day.n.04
level1.definition: a day devoted to an outdoor social gathering

level1.name: text.n.01
level1.definition: the words of something written

level1.name: rewrite.v.01
level1.definition: write differently; alter the writing of

level1.name: organism.n.01
level1.definition: a living thing that has (or can develop) the ability to act or function independently

level1.name: inch.n.01
level1.definition: a unit of length equal to one twelfth of a foot

level1.name: audience.n.01
level1.definition: a gathering of spectators or listeners at a (usually public) performance

level1.name: angstrom.n.01
level1.definition: a metric unit of length equal to one ten billionth of a meter (or 0.0001 micron); used to specify wavelengths of electromagnetic radiation

level1.name: necessity.n.02
level1.definition: anything indispensable

level1.name: accessible.a.01
level1.definition: capable of being reached

level1.name: two.n.01
level1.definition: the cardinal number that is the sum of one and one or a numeral representing this number

level1.name: readership.n.01
level1.definition: the audience reached by written communications (books or magazines or newspapers etc.)

level1.name: angstrom.n.01
level1.definition: a metric unit of length equal to one ten billionth of a meter (or 0.0001 micron); used to specify wavelengths of electromagnetic radiation

level1.name: position.n.01
level1.definition: the particular portion of space occupied by something

level1.name: general.n.01
level1.definition: a general officer of the highest rank

level1.name: between.r.01
level1.definition: in the interval

level2.name: hominid.n.01
level2.definition: a primate of the family Hominidae

level2.name: duty.n.02
level2.definition: work that you are obliged to perform for moral or legal reasons

level2.name: scholar.n.01
level2.definition: a learned person (especially in the humanities); someone who by long study has gained mastery in one or more disciplines

level2.name: epoch.n.03
level2.definition: a unit of geological time that is a subdivision of a period and is itself divided into ages

level2.name: vacation.n.01
level2.definition: leisure time away from work devoted to rest or pleasure

level2.name: matter.n.06
level2.definition: written works (especially in books or magazines)

level2.name: linear_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a unit of measurement of length

level2.name: gathering.n.01
level2.definition: a group of persons together in one place

level2.name: metric_linear_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a linear unit of distance in metric terms

level2.name: digit.n.01
level2.definition: one of the elements that collectively form a system of numeration

level2.name: audience.n.02
level2.definition: the part of the general public interested in a source of information or entertainment

level2.name: metric_linear_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a linear unit of distance in metric terms

level2.name: point.n.02
level2.definition: the precise location of something; a spatially limited location

level2.name: general_officer.n.01
level2.definition: officers in the Army or Air Force or Marines above the rank of colonel

level3.name: primate.n.02
level3.definition: any placental mammal of the order Primates; has good eyesight and flexible hands and feet

level3.name: work.n.01
level3.definition: activity directed toward making or doing something

level3.name: intellectual.n.01
level3.definition: a person who uses the mind creatively

level3.name: geological_time.n.01
level3.definition: the time of the physical formation and development of the earth (especially prior to human history)

level3.name: leisure.n.01
level3.definition: time available for ease and relaxation

level3.name: writing.n.02
level3.definition: the work of a writer; anything expressed in letters of the alphabet (especially when considered from the point of view of style and effect)

level3.name: whole.n.02
level3.definition: an assemblage of parts that is regarded as a single entity

level3.name: unit_of_measurement.n.01
level3.definition: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange

level3.name: metric_unit.n.01
level3.definition: a decimal unit of measurement of the metric system (based on meters and kilograms and seconds)

level3.name: integer.n.01
level3.definition: any of the natural numbers (positive or negative) or zero

level3.name: metric_unit.n.01
level3.definition: a decimal unit of measurement of the metric system (based on meters and kilograms and seconds)

level3.name: location.n.01

level4.name: placental.n.01
level4.definition: mammals having a placenta; all mammals except monotremes and marsupials

level4.name: time.n.05

level4.name: time_off.n.01

level4.definition: communication by means of written symbols (either printed or handwritten)

level4.definition: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange
